title: Memberships & Passes
subtitle: Build trackable daycare and boarding memberships in one place, then link purchases directly to client profiles.
subtitle_secondary: This module supports fixed-use packs like 10 daycare days, capped monthly passes, and unlimited monthly passes.
error_business_unresolved: Unable to resolve your business account.
validation_choose_service: Choose whether this membership applies to daycare or boarding.
validation_package_units_required: Packages must include at least one unit.
validation_monthly_months_required: Monthly passes must have a duration in months.
validation_duration_days_positive: Duration in days must be greater than zero.
plan_library_count: {count} active plan{plural} ready for client assignment or booking purchase.
empty_state: No memberships yet. Start with a 10-day daycare pack, a capped monthly pass, or a boarding nights package.
config_line_one: Create service-specific plans so balances are easy to consume automatically at booking.
config_line_two: Use packages for fixed balances like 10 daycare days or 30 boarding nights.
config_line_three: Use monthly passes for one-month access. Leave included units blank to make the pass unlimited.
config_line_four: Turn off booking purchase if a plan should only be assigned manually by staff.
editor_subtitle: Keep each plan tied to a single service so balance tracking stays predictable across web, iOS, and Android.
monthly_included_units_helper: Leave this blank to make the pass unlimited until it expires.
package_included_units_helper: This balance is decremented automatically as bookings use the plan.
package_duration_helper: Leave blank if the package does not expire automatically.
months_duration_helper: The pass expires this many months after the client buys it.
allow_purchase_at_booking_label: Allow clients to buy this during booking
internal_notes_placeholder: Optional notes for staff, billing, or redemption rules.
